_comment: Reviewed expected recyclable-proportion floors (0–1) for materials whose grade is NOT encoded as a (NN.N%) suffix in the material name. Keyed on the EXACT machine `descriptionWaste` (column I) string — including any en-dash. Materials whose name already carries a (NN.N%) grade (e.g. the three '(97.5%)' lines) need no entry here: the detector parses that suffix directly. Add a material here only after reviewing its typical declared proportion in the data (ADR-007: reviewed data tables ship as JSON).
